claim.summary: Lane 1 patched the canonical Main Flow to document that node 1009 Character B Actor Body is optional for actor_hand_only_contact_v1 because it feeds QA preview only; active hand-driven contact uses node 1012 through the combined mask chain. Structural validation passes with no endpoint or active-path input errors.
